scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run build:angular
scripts.start:lib: npm run build:angular && npm --prefix examples/angular run start
scripts.build:angular: pnpm run build:core && tsc -p packages/widgets/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/zod/tsconfig.json && ng-packagr -p packages/angular/ng-package.json -c packages/angular/tsconfig.lib.json && node scripts/prepare-angular-dist.mjs
scripts.build:demo: npm run build:angular && npm --prefix examples/angular run build
scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:adapters && npm run test:widgets && npm run test:angular && npm run test:guides
scripts.test:angular: npm run build:core && tsc -p packages/zod/tsconfig.json && jest -c packages/angular/jest.config.cjs
scripts.test:bundle: npm --prefix packages/angular/bundle-test run build && node scripts/check-bundle.mjs
scripts.build:packages: npm run build:core && tsc -p packages/widgets/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/zod/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/standard-schema/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/vue/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/react/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/lit/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/solid/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/preact/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/svelte/tsconfig.json && npm run build:styles
scripts.test:adapters: npm run build:packages && node --test packages/zod/test/*.test.mjs packages/standard-schema/test/*.test.mjs packages/vue/test/*.test.mjs packages/react/test/*.test.mjs packages/lit/test/*.test.mjs packages/preact/test/*.test.mjs packages/svelte/test/*.test.mjs && node --conditions=browser --test packages/solid/test/*.test.mjs
scripts.demo:angular: npm run build:angular && npm --prefix examples/angular run start
scripts.demo:react: npm run build:examples && node scripts/serve-example.mjs react 4301
scripts.demo:vue: npm run build:examples && node scripts/serve-example.mjs vue 4302
scripts.demo:lit: npm run build:examples && node scripts/serve-example.mjs lit 4303
scripts.demo:preact: npm run build:examples && node scripts/serve-example.mjs preact 4304
scripts.demo:solid: npm run build:examples && node scripts/serve-example.mjs solid 4305
scripts.demo:svelte: npm run build:examples && node scripts/serve-example.mjs svelte 4306
scripts.release:integrate: pnpm changeset status && pnpm changeset version && pnpm install --lockfile-only && git add -A && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./packages/core/package.json').version") && git commit -m "chore(release): version packages to v$VERSION" && git tag -a "v$VERSION" -m "v$VERSION"
scripts.release: npm run build:packages && npm run build:angular && node scripts/publish-workspace.mjs && node scripts/publish-angular.mjs
scripts.release:stage: npm run build:packages && npm run build:angular && node scripts/publish-workspace.mjs --stage && node scripts/publish-angular.mjs --stage
